title: Point Blank - Ferret's Minecraftier PB Printers
description: Changes the Point Blank Weapon Printer into a pixel-consistent secret workbench.
body:
Replace's Point Blank's Weapon Printer with a more grounded and interesting solution!

An inexplicably high-tech 3d printer doesn't fit your modpack? Try this workbench hidden in a tool cabinet instead! Comes with new mechanical sounds, a horrendously over-engineered design and a complete lack of drawers, instead coming with a pop-out work surface!

Features:
- Redone model and textures! It's a garage cabinet now!
- Redone animations! Pop-out work surface complete with moving ammo press!
- Redone sounds! Crafting now sounds like crafting!
- Redone UI! Now in the vanilla style we all know and love!
